name: Dill Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh dill or 1 teaspoon dried dill weed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a tightly covered container, combine all ingredients.
2. Shake to mix thoroughly.
3. Use about 1/2 cup vinaigrette, measuring 1 tablespoon per serving.
4. For mixed herb variation: Substitute parsley for the dill weed and coarsely-ground black pepper for the pepper. Omit nutmeg. Stir in basil leaves.
